label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the question and the text carefully. The question is asking why social networking sites are harmful to users. The options are A, B, C, D. The text states that social networking sites can increase the risk of diseases and cause isolation. It mentions that these sites make people more isolated. Dr. Sigman says that the increased isolation may alter immune response and increase the risk of cancer, strokes, heart attacks, and dementia. Also, it says that the time people spend meeting face to face has decreased with the rise of electronic media, leading to less time with family and less social interaction ability. Looking at the options: A. they fail to bring users the pleasure they want. The text says they do bring pleasure but also have negative effects. So this is incorrect. B. they don't bring users enough convenience. The text says they provide convenience (facilitate communication, play games), but the issue is the isolation, not lack of convenience. So this is not right. C. more isolation is caused by less direct communication. This matches
